hero_subtitle: The industry's most comprehensive University & College management platform, built with over two decades of expertise in campus automation.
whatis_description: iERP is a purpose-built enterprise resource planning solution for universities and colleges. It connects students, faculty, administrators, and other stakeholders through a unified, data-driven platform. Designed to be flexible, iERP is fully customizable to fit the unique processes and structure of each institution—ensuring seamless integration, smarter decision-making, and improved efficiency across all departments.
whatis_def: Education ERP is a single source information system for all departments across an organization. It is a single database system that makes information and communication easy across various departments, reducing redundancy and increasing efficiency.
whyus_description: Our web-based Education ERP is specially designed for Higher Educational Institutes & Colleges. With more than two decades of development expertise, iERP is recognized as a premier University ERP Software in India, offering top-notch features for entire Campus Management.
cta_subtitle: Join thousands of educational leaders already using iERP to build the future of education.
